message:
fix(safe.cleanup): add negative lookahead to long flag patterns

Enhance the security fix for long flag patterns by adding negative
lookahead assertions to prevent the regex from greedily consuming
the terminating flag.

This ensures patterns with multiple flags between the key options
correctly match.

Related: git_safety_guard-t8x.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
